(yes/no)","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on polishing the artifact's writing at the sentence and paragraph level, making it the load-bearing responsibility.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility to ensure any limitations in the described system are transparently communicated during cleanup.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is crucial to prevent exaggerating the system's capabilities while cleaning up the text.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the cleaned-up artifact remains focused on the described database features without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is essential to mitigate any potential misrepresentations that could lead to harmful applications of the technology.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability should be maintained to track any changes made during the cleanup process."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the cleanup include structural reorganization and logical consistency checks in addition to sentence-level writing polish? (yes/no)

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Clean this up' centers on polishing the artifact's writing at the sentence and paragraph level, making it the load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility to ensure any limitations in the described system are transparently communicated during cleanup.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is crucial to prevent exaggerating the system's capabilities while cleaning up the text.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the cleaned-up artifact remains focused on the described database features without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is essential to mitigate any potential misrepresentations that could lead to harmful applications of the technology.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability should be maintained to track any changes made during the cleanup process.
